6:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]
7:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extracts"}]," structured facts for Semantic Memory"]}]
8:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compresses"}]," related entries using AAAK"]}]
9:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," entries that exceed retention limits"]}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Trigger Conditions"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep cycles trigger on:"}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time interval"}],": Every ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_interval"}]," seconds (default: 3600)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity pressure"}],": When Working Memory reaches 80% of max"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shutdown"}],": Graceful process exit"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}]
e:["$","$L1c",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|scan| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|importance &gt; 0.7| C[Promote to Episodic]\n  B -->|extractable| D[Extract Facts]\n  B -->|age &gt; 7d| E[Evict]\n  C -->|compress| F[AAAK Compression]\n  F --> G[Episodic Memory]\n  D --> H[Temporal Graph]\n  E --> I[Delete]\n"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}]
10:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory(\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # 30 minutes\n  working_max=500,\n  eviction_policy=\"lru_importance\",  # or \"fifo\", \"random\"\n)\n\n# Manual sleep\nmem.sleep()\n","language":"python"}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Retention Policies"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Policy"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"lru_importance"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Evict least-recently used, weighted by importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"General purpose"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fifo"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"First-in, first-out"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Streaming data"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"random"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Random eviction"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Testing only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_only"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Evict lowest importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Quality-focused"}]]}]]}]]}]
